title: cuk
description: Cuk converter excitation. Five wiring variants are supported via the boolean flags below: V1 non-isolated (defaults), V2 coupled-inductor zero-ripple (coupledInductor=true), V3 transformer-isolated (isolated=true), V4 synchronous (synchronous=true), V5 bidirectional (bidirectional=true, V4 implied). For V1/V2/V4/V5 the magnetic returned by process_design_requirements is the input inductor L1 (V2: a 2-winding coupled inductor); for V3 it is a 2-winding transformer. The remaining reactive elements (L2, C1, Co, plus Ca/Cb in V3) are emitted via get_extra_components_inputs.

inputVoltage.description: The input voltage of the Cuk

diodeVoltageDrop.description: The voltage drop on the diode (ignored when synchronous=true)

maximumSwitchCurrent.description: The maximum current that can go through the selected switch

currentRippleRatio.description: The maximum input-inductor (L1) current ripple ratio (delta-IL1 / IL1_avg)

synchronous.description: If true, the catch diode D1 is replaced by an actively-driven synchronous switch S2. Reduces conduction loss; mandatory for bidirectional=true.

bidirectional.description: If true, both switches are active and the converter can transfer power in either direction depending on operatingPoint.powerFlow. Implies synchronous=true.

isolated.description: If true, the coupling capacitor is split into Ca/Cb and an isolation transformer is inserted between them. The magnetic returned is the transformer (2 windings, isolation sides PRIMARY and SECONDARY); L1 and L2 become extra components.

coupledInductor.description: If true, L1 and L2 are wound on the same core with coupling coefficient couplingCoefficient (Cuk's zero-ripple trick when k = sqrt(L1/L2)). The magnetic returned is a 2-winding coupled inductor. Mutually exclusive with isolated=true.

turnsRatio.description: Transformer turns ratio Np:Ns for isolated=true (used as Vo/Vin step targeting). Ignored for non-isolated variants.

couplingCoefficient.description: Magnetic coupling coefficient k between L1 and L2 (used only when coupledInductor=true). Zero-ripple condition: k * sqrt(L2/L1) = 1.

couplingCapacitanceSecondary.description: Secondary-side coupling capacitance Cb in farads (used only when isolated=true). If absent, Cb defaults to Ca scaled by turnsRatio^2 to balance V*s on each side.

cukPowerFlow.description: Power-flow direction for one operating point of a bidirectional Cuk (ignored when bidirectional=false).
cukPowerFlow.title: cukPowerFlow

cukOperatingPoint.description: The description of one Cuk operating point. NOTE: outputVoltages magnitudes are passed positive here; Vo is signed negative internally per Cuk polarity convention. powerFlow is required only when the parent Cuk has bidirectional=true.
cukOperatingPoint.title: cukOperatingPoint

powerFlow.description: Power-flow direction. Forward = source -> load via L1; reverse = load -> source via L2.
